channel.title: Gastronauts
channel.description: Latest releases from Gastronauts on Dropout.tv

item.title: Now That's a Good Chef, Yum!
item.description:
Chefs Raquel Fleetwood, Christopher Sanchez, and Amanda Rios create the tallest meal for Demi, Jeremy, and Kimia.

Duration: 40:30

Tags: Gastronauts, jordan myrick, food, cooking, competitions, eating, chaos, demi adejuyigbe, jeremy culhane, kimia behpoornia, raquel fleetwood, christopher sanchez, amanda rios

item.title: Car-Rib-Bean
item.description:
Chefs Jenn de la Vega, Shieya Beth Evans, and Ashley Morgan make toxic tasty for Persephone, Erika, and Becca.

Duration: 38:50

Tags: Gastronauts, jordan myrick, food, cooking, competitions, eating, chaos, persephone valentine, erika ishii, becca scott, jenn de la vega, shieya beth evans, ashley morgan
